title: ItzLuwix's CPvP Essentials
description: An all-in-one resource pack that includes everything you need for CPvP, saving you from downloading multiple packs.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8049aa1da5313f9848ec054a883fe2708b8ffd22.png)

## An all-in-one CPvP resource pack with everything you need

If you’re into Crystal PvP, you already know how annoying the screen can get when everything has particles and the visuals get messy. This pack is made to **clean up the visuals**, **reduce clutter**, and help you stay locked in during fights.

## Why use this pack?

The fewer particles and distractions on your screen, the more you can focus on the fight.

This pack helps you:

* track your opponent easier
* keep your screen clear during mid-fights
* play more consistent when it really matters

A lot of competitive CPvP players already use packs like this — this one just puts all the essentials in one place.

## What does it change?

These are the changes this pack makes:

* **Removes totem particles** (no more annoying screen particles)
* **Shrinks the totem pop animation** so it doesn’t block your view
* **Removes explosion particles** for clearer fights
* **Removes block particles** to reduce distractions
* **Lowers the fire overlay and shrinks ground fire visuals** so you can see clearly even when you're burning or fighting around flames
* **Makes items smaller** for better overall awareness

## Why it’s worth it

* You don’t need to stack 5 different packs like “No Particles”, “Smaller Fire”, or “Smaller Shield” — this pack includes all the essentials for CPvP.
* It only edits the features listed above, so it **won’t mess with your other textures or the game's actual textures.**
  You can still use your favorite resource packs alongside it.

## Only for CPvP?

Not at all.

You can use it for anything where you want more screen visibility:

* other PvP modes
* minigames
* practice servers
* basically any situation where visuals get messy

## Contact

Having issues or found a bug? DM me on Discord: **ItzLuwix**

Support my projects: [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/itzluwix)
